summary: Iteration 109 - Field Agent Verification & Declaration Testing COMPLETE. Backend: 12/13 tests passed (1 skipped due to fixture dependency). Frontend: All UI components verified working - Verifier tab with mode toggle, parcels list with stats, verification form with declared/measured values sections, declaration form with all fields.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoints properly implemented: assigned-farmers, farmer-parcels POST, parcels-to-verify, parcels/{id}/verify
Carbon score calculation integrated in both declaration and verification flows
Frontend VerificationTab has proper mode toggle (data-testid: mode-verify, mode-declare)
Declaration form pre-fills village from farmer profile as expected
Verification form shows declared values (read-only blue section) and measured values (editable) side-by-side
All form fields have proper data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Field agent verification and declaration features fully tested. Backend rate limiter may block tests if run too frequently - restart backend to clear in-memory rate limit store. Login endpoint uses 'identifier' field (not 'email') and returns 'access_token' (not 'token').

backend_apis: GET /api/field-agent/assigned-farmers - PASSED: Returns list of assigned farmers with parcel counts
POST /api/field-agent/farmer-parcels/{farmer_id} - PASSED: Creates new parcel with carbon score calculation
GET /api/field-agent/parcels-to-verify - PASSED: Returns parcels to verify with stats (pending, needs_correction, verified)
GET /api/field-agent/parcels-to-verify?status_filter=X - PASSED: Filters work for pending, needs_correction, verified, all
PUT /api/field-agent/parcels/{parcel_id}/verify - PASSED: Verifies parcel with measured values and recalculates carbon score
PUT /api/field-agent/parcels/{parcel_id}/verify with invalid status - PASSED: Returns 400 error
PUT /api/field-agent/parcels/{parcel_id}/verify with invalid ID - PASSED: Returns 400/404 error
Authentication required on all endpoints - PASSED: Returns 401/403 without token
